borrower_name.rationale: Docs legal 'Marcus Anthony Webb'; broker correction preferred 'Marcus Webb'. Per Layer 3 #9 (c): F1.BN broker_correction tier always wins; preferred name used in canonical_map for all broker-facing comms.
